generated_oml:
instance MotorPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted on motor shaft for measuring rotational position"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder located behind gearbox for measuring output shaft position"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring electrical current input to permanent magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoder
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTEnabler, DashboardEnabler
]

instance SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryPositionEncoder
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTEnabler, DashboardEnabler
]

instance CurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTEnabler, DashboardEnabler
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Rotational position data from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, DashboardEnabler
]

instance SecondaryPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Rotational position data from secondary encoder behind gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, DashboardEnabler
]

instance CurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Input current measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, DashboardEnabler
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity derived from motor position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, DashboardEnabler
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque output calculated from current measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, DashboardEnabler
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML tool for structural modeling of components and connectors"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for dynamic system simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService, VisualizationService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for digital twin asset management"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance DashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Visualization dashboard for real-time monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance SysMLEngineeringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML component and connector diagrams for robot axis structure"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SimulinkMotorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of permanent magnet synchronous motor dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkGearwheelModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of gearwheel dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkGearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of cycloidal gearbox dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb and viscous friction model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model for low-velocity effects"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model for dynamic friction behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model for precise friction simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor with current input and torque output"
]

instance GearTransmission : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gear transmission component between motor and gearbox"
]

instance CycloidalGear : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox component for precise motion control"
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for axis control via position, speed, or acceleration inputs"
]

instance RobotAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "First axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot with [-90°, 90°] range and 75°/s max speed"
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, GearTransmission, CycloidalGear, SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNController
]

instance FrictionModelIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of white-box and black-box friction models during operation"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated visualization of system data and friction models via dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance MotionAccuracyImprovementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Improving motion control accuracy through friction model updates"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyAction
]

instance FrictionModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction identification insights used to improve robot motion control accuracy through model updates"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of system data and friction models for monitoring"
]

instance MotionAccuracyAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of robot motion control parameters based on updated friction models"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "No virtual-to-physical interaction as the system is a digital shadow with one-way data flow from physical to virtual only."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming and processing for live measurements."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrates sensors, SysML structural models, Simulink simulation models, AAS, and MQTT for data linking, with processing components generating data traces visualized in a unified dashboard."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated stage, using live operational data for friction modeling during robot operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity validated by comparing simulated data against measured data, accounting for load, temperature, and wear effects in friction models."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for streaming sensor data from physical system to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell (AAS) and SysML standards for modeling."
]
